title: Contact us - Bank of Canada
content:
Our head office in Ottawa and regional offices serve as contact points for Canadians requiring assistance to access services offered by the Bank.
234 Wellington Street Ottawa, ON, K1A 0G9
Monday to Friday 9:00 to 17:00 (ET) Bank of Canada Holiday Schedule
Find contact information and representatives for our regional offices.
The Bank of Canada recognizes that social media platforms represent important tools for providing information about our programs and services.
Get notified by email whenever the Bank releases new information.
Subscribe to our feeds to get the latest content from the Bank of Canada.
The Bank of Canada Valet Web Services offers programmatic access to global financial data.
Learn about what we do and how we can help, or contact us.
Journalists: Submit media questions or request an interview.

### Unclaimed Properties Office
Search for unclaimed bank balances, make a claim, and check the status of a claim. Learn how and where to redeem your Canada Savings Bonds.
Validate a request from the Bank of Canada to participate in one of our business surveys. Contact Public Info .
Validate meeting requests you receive from us by contacting Consultations . We visit cities across Canada to meet with:
- educational institutions
Submit a form to invite a member of our team to speak to your event.
See also: Our principles for external communication

### Visits and technical assistance
- Arrange a visit: We host organizations for meetings with our experts at head office.
- Request technical assistance: We provide technical assistance to other central banks and supervisory authorities.

### Access to Information and Privacy (ATIP)
Make an Access to Information Act or Privacy Act request.
The Bank’s Accessibility Plan shares how we strive to be accessible to everyone. Let us know how we’re doing— share your feedback with us .
Information on the Bank’s historical records.
